issue_title: perception: evaluate false-positive actor-injection observation-quality replay

merged_prs.role: first executable replay evidence path; blocked_unavailable classification
fail-closed readiness checks for incompatible structured-pedestrian views
structured SocNav pedestrian-slot injection support and paired smoke evidence
pre-registered stronger structured false-positive replay matrix
stronger-matrix executable replay evidence classified scenario_too_weak
ORCA reactive executable replay evidence classified observed

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Executable false-positive actor-injection replay command exists or fails closed with an actionable blocker.
Report distinguishes executable replay evidence from trace-derived diagnostics.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: PR #4486 and PR #4601 evidence bundles record executable replay mode and CPU-smoke caveats.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: False-positive effects are reported separately from false-negative/noise effects.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: Issue-specific false-positive actor-injection reports and profiles from PR #4431 and PR #4601.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Scenario, seed, planner mode, perturbation family, execution mode, fallback/degraded status, and caveats are recorded.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: PR #4486 and PR #4601 README, summary.json, and robustness_delta.csv artifacts.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Unavailable actor injection records exact prerequisite and next proof step.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: PR #4390 and PR #4413 recorded blockers; PR #4431 and PR #4601 removed them for structured replay.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: Bounded result exists for missing false-positive acceptance dimension.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: PR #4601 classified ORCA replay as observed after 101 injected pedestrians changed predeclared replay outcomes.

acceptance_evidence.criterion: No hardware sensor realism, robustness-promotion, paper, or dissertation claim is made.
acceptance_evidence.evidence: Merged evidence bundles and this audit keep the result CPU-smoke/diagnostic only.

closure_decision.reason: Original acceptance criteria are met by merged PRs; the only live remainder is a broader full replay campaign, which is outside this CPU-only closure-audit scope and should be tracked separately if pursued.

residual_risks.risk: No full benchmark campaign was run.
residual_risks.why_it_remains: Compute campaign execution is outside the task authorization and is not promoted as issue #3300 acceptance evidence.

residual_risks.risk: Observed ORCA replay is smoke/diagnostic evidence only.
residual_risks.why_it_remains: The evidence is six paired CPU-local rows, sufficient for the issue acceptance dimension but not for benchmark-strength or paper-facing claims.
